query: SELECT id, subject, LENGTH(body) as body_len, LEFT(body, 200) as body_preview, LENGTH(bodyHtml) as html_len, LEFT(bodyHtml, 200) as html_preview FROM emails WHERE id IN (180002, 180008, 180010, 180009);
